chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. NO. S-654 OF 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 03.04.2023: Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan and Mrs. Shehla Anjum Advocate alongwith Petitioner Ms. Uzma Rafiq Advocate for the Respondent No.5 Ms. Shahnaz, Advoate for Panah Shelter Home Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Zahoor Shah, Addl. P.G. Sindh SIP Khadim Hussain, I.O. P.S. Mominabad ---- It appears that the little girl is indeed under age, however, conclusive determination has to be made after an Ossification test. The Doctors have reported that Ossification test cannot happen at the moment because the girl is expecting Aslam Ghouri, her husband has been arrested and at the moment is in custody. Learned Counsel for Panah Shelter Home submits that although she cannot be sure, as the Ossification test has not been done, according to her the girl looks very little and below 18 years of age. Let Panah Shelter Home release the girl into the custody of her parents. Petition stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Amjad PS
